title: Sew on Rhinestones Round, 10 mm Glass Rhinestones for Clothes Clear 144 PCS, Silver Setting with 8 Holes, DIY Wedding Dress Jewelry Shoes Bag Table Party Decoration
features: 【Dazzling and Shiny】The faceted design makes these rhinestones sparkle like diamonds and stand out especially in the light. Perfect as a great decoration to add sparkle to your crafts, clothes, dresses, shoes and more.

【High Quality Materials】Our rhinestones are made of glass material, which is durable, bright and lightweight, and shines beautifully. The cut surface of the rhinestone is beautiful and the brightness is high. The metal claw setting holds the rhinestones firmly, you don't have to worry about the rhinestones falling off.

【Easy to Use】There are 8 small holes in the silver prong setting of the rhinestones, so you can attach them with needle and thread. Sewn-on rhinestones are more stable than glued ones. The prong setting can firmly fix the rhinestones, not easy to fall off, very convenient to use.

【Wide Application】Rhinestones are widely used for sewing clothes, skirts, evening dresses, cosplay costumes, wedding dresses, handbags, purses, shoes, hats, headscarves, etc. It can be used to make jewelry such as bracelets, necklaces, brooches, hair ornaments, earrings, etc. Also ideal for DIY, decorate cellphone, mirror, furniture and other crafts.

【DIY】The rhinestones for crafts are exquisite craft accessories, which you can use to make exquisite gifts for your relatives and friends or yourself. NOTE: Because rhinestones are tiny pieces, please keep them out of the reach of children to avoid choking if accidentally swallowed.
